problem.title: String to Integer
problem.description: Implement the myAtoi(string s) function, which converts a string to a 32-bit signed integer.

solutions.title: Solution 1 – Character by Character
solutions.description: Strip leading whitespace, detect an optional sign character, then parse consecutive digit characters into a running integer value. Clamp the result to 32-bit signed integer bounds (−2³¹ to 2³¹−1) as digits are accumulated to prevent overflow. The key insight is checking bounds during accumulation rather than after, which correctly handles very large digit sequences.
